description_long: This object is a modern all-in-one desktop computer setup, featuring a large, flat widescreen monitor with a thin, metallic bezel and a matching stand. The display is accompanied by a full-sized keyboard and a wireless mouse, both designed in a minimalist style with a metallic finish. The monitor's rear panel is slightly textured and features a central support arm that connects to a wide, stable base. The front of the monitor displays a login screen, indicating it is powered on and functional. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with a focus on clean lines and a professional appearance. No visible buttons or ports are present on the front or sides, and a subtle logo is located on the rear panel just above the stand.
description: A sleek, modern all-in-one desktop computer with a large widescreen monitor, metallic stand, keyboard, and mouse. The design is minimalist with a thin bezel and a subtle rear logo.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the textured metallic back panel, central support arm, and a subtle logo above the stand.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the ultra-thin display, angled stand, and the alignment of the keyboard and mouse in front.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the widescreen monitor with a thin bezel, keyboard, mouse, and an active login screen.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the slimness of the monitor and the arrangement of the keyboard and mouse.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, metallic, and sleek with a matte finish, featuring slightly rounded corners and a subtle color contrast between the bezel and the display area.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a wide, angular pedestal made of metallic material, with a triangular support arm connecting to a broad, stable base. It appears fixed and does not show visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on the front, sides, or rear of the monitor.
attribute_brand_logo: A subtle brand logo is present on the rear panel, centered above the stand, with a minimalist design.
